title: Default view on mobile
excerpt:
Hello, 
I love that you made a default view on the web version of Monday. 
Could you make that same default view apply to mobile? 
Side Note: I put a request in to be able to limit certain views to certain user/user type…

posts.author: cbacon (Caleb Bacon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I love that you made a default view on the web version of Monday.
Could you make that same default view apply to mobile?

Side Note: I put a request in to be able to limit certain views to certain user/user types. Is that something that is going to be put into effect?

posts.author: dwadsworth (Dustin Wadsworth)
posts.cookedHtml:
Has this issue been resolved at all? Not applying the same default board view to the mobile application is a serious issue for my workflow.

I need the user experience to be the same if someone clicks on a notification for a new item, or when they go to the board and click to open that item.

I see serious discrepancies for what is visible in the item’s overview depending on how I navigate to that area.

posts.author: mitchellgp (Mitchell)
posts.cookedHtml: We’d die for this “feature”, don’t know how this isn’t built in already!

posts.author: GABC (Grant Lee)
posts.cookedHtml: If they aligned the mobile and desktop applications that would be great. We set a default view on desktop but noticed the default view isn’t possible on the mobile application. Please help!
